name: Check Inventory Sheet to Google Calendar

parameters.content:
## Check Inventory Sheet to Google Calendar

### How it works

This workflow watches an inventory Google Sheet for updates and keeps corresponding Google Calendar events in sync. When a row changes, it checks whether the row already has an event ID, searches for an existing event if needed, creates missing events, or updates existing events when fields have changed. It writes newly created or discovered event IDs back to the sheet and sends Telegram notifications for creations and updates.

### Setup steps

- Connect Google Sheets credentials and configure the trigger to watch the correct spreadsheet and sheet/tab.
- Connect Google Calendar credentials and set the target calendar for searching, creating, retrieving, and updating events.
- Add a sheet column for the Google Calendar event ID and ensure the workflow expressions map inventory row fields to calendar event title, date/time, and description fields.
- Connect Telegram bot credentials and configure the chat ID or channel for creation and update notifications.

### Customization

Adjust the event matching logic, change detection conditions, calendar field mappings, and Telegram message templates to fit the inventory sheet structure.

## Sheet update routing

Starts when the inventory sheet changes and decides whether the row already has a calendar event ID or needs lookup/creation handling.

## Find existing event

Searches Google Calendar for a matching event when the sheet row lacks an event ID, then determines whether a match was found and backfills the ID when possible.

## Create missing event

Combines the branches that require a new calendar entry and creates the Google Calendar event.

## Record creation result

Handles the results of a newly created event by updating the sheet with the event ID and preparing/sending a Telegram creation notification.

## Check existing event

Retrieves the current calendar event by its stored ID and compares it with the updated sheet data to decide whether an update is needed.

## Update and notify

Updates the existing Google Calendar event, aggregates the update details, and sends a Telegram message confirming the change.
